briefing.headline: Global intelligence: ai & technology and geopolitics.
briefing.summary: This week's highest-signal global coverage centers on ai & technology and geopolitics. Key headlines: AMD Commits More Than $10 Billion to Taiwan AI Investments; Walkers sick after drinking river water on the West Highland Way. The desk weighted editorial importance and recency — not every headline warrants action.
briefing.keySignal: Dominant theme · Geopolitics leads the week; ai & technology remains a secondary thread.
